news.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

news.title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.

news.title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

news.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

news.title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.

news.title: Microsoft to layoff over 5,000 employees across teams
news.description: [BUSINESS TODAY] The workforce reduction may impact sales, Xbox gaming division, and consulting, while it continues to invest heavily in Artificial Intelligence (AI) infrastructure.

news.title: The AI power grab: How the race to build artificial intelligence is driving up your electricity bill
news.description: [FIRSTPOST] Rapid expansion of AI infrastructure is straining power grids, driving up household electricity costs and fuelling a political debate over who should pay for the energy transition.

news.title: Fugu vs GLM-5.2 vs Mythos: Why AI benchmarks crown different winners
news.description: [BUSINESS STANDARD] AI benchmark race: Sakana AI's Fugu, Z.ai's GLM-5.2 and Anthropic's Claude Mythos trade blows across coding, reasoning and agentic AI tests, revealing a fragmented leadership landscape.

news.title: Anthropic joins AI race in healthcare with drug discovery program: What it is, everything else to know
news.description: [INDIA TODAY] Anthropic has entered the healthcare AI space with a drug discovery programme. The move adds it to a widening race to apply artificial intelligence in medicine.

news.title: Tech exports boost China’s June factory activity
news.description: [ARKANSAS ONLINE] HONG KONG -- China's factory activity picked up pace in June, an official survey showed Tuesday, as demand for artificial intelligence hardware made exports robust.

news.title: AI companies urged to pay up or stay out of Australia
news.description: [PERTHNOW] Australian news outlets are under threat from a growing number of hungry tech companies, including artificial intelligence firms which do not pay for content.
